text: District Economy: Bengaluru Urban, Karnataka. GSDP: ₹5.8 lakh crore. Per Capita: ₹4.5 lakh. Top sector: IT/BPO ($100B+). 4,000+ tech companies. India's startup capital (12,000+ startups). ISRO, HAL, BEL headquarters. Aerospace hub.

District Economy: Mumbai, Maharashtra. GSDP: ₹12 lakh crore. Per Capita: ₹5.5 lakh. India's financial capital. BSE (Asia's oldest exchange), NSE, RBI HQ. Bollywood: ₹19,000 cr industry. JNPT: 50% of containerized cargo.

District Economy: Gurugram, Haryana. GSDP: ₹2.35 lakh crore. Per capita: ₹6.8 lakh (among highest). 500+ Fortune 500 offices. Maruti Suzuki HQ. DLF Cyber City. India's corporate hub alongside Mumbai. Rapid urbanization.

District Economy: Surat, Gujarat. GSDP: ₹3 lakh crore. Per Capita: ₹3.1 lakh. World's diamond cutting capital (90% of world's diamonds). Textile hub: 40,000+ power looms. Chemical corridor. One of India's cleanest cities.

District Economy: Ludhiana, Punjab. GSDP: ₹95,000 crore. Per Capita: ₹2.35 lakh. Manchester of India — hosiery capital. 95% of India's bicycle production. Auto components hub. Agricultural hinterland. Industrial SME clusters.

District Economy: Coimbatore, Tamil Nadu. GSDP: ₹1.2 lakh crore. Per Capita: ₹2.9 lakh. Engineering cluster — 30,000+ MSMEs. World's pump manufacturing hub. Textile: 25,000+ mills. Growing IT sector. Education hub.
